description.ko: AQUA-5와 함께 미지의 미드나잇 존으로 여정을 떠나보세요. 생물 발광 생명체들의 고요한 아름다움과 심해 바닥의 웅장한 신비로움을 목격할 수 있습니다.
description.en: Journey into the uncharted midnight zone with AQUA-5, witnessing the silent beauty of bioluminescent life forms and the majestic mystery of the deep ocean floor.

prompt: A high-tech submersible named AQUA-5 navigating through the deepest trenches of the ocean, surrounded by bioluminescent flora and rare deep-sea creatures, cinematic lighting with neon blue and purple glows, hyper-realistic underwater textures, 8k resolution, ethereal atmosphere.
